name: Fairway Finder
challenge_description: Hit the fairway off the tee on a par 4 or 5.

name: Green Light
challenge_description: Reach the green in regulation.

name: Clean Start
challenge_description: No penalty strokes on the hole.

name: Two-Putt Pro
challenge_description: Take no more than two putts once on the green.

name: Bogey Saver
challenge_description: Make bogey or better.

name: Solid Contact
challenge_description: Advance every full swing at least 70% of intended distance with no whiffs or duffs.

name: No Sand Trouble
challenge_description: Avoid all bunkers on the hole.

name: Recovery Artist
challenge_description: Miss the fairway but still make bogey or better.

name: First-Putt Friend
challenge_description: Your first putt finishes within 3 feet of the hole.

name: Straight Ball
challenge_description: No shot on the hole ends out of bounds or in a hazard.

name: Par 3 Survivor
challenge_description: On a par 3, make bogey or better.

name: Good Miss
challenge_description: Miss the green but get up-and-down for bogey or better.

name: Center Face-ish
challenge_description: No topped or chunked full swings on the hole.

name: Keep It Moving
challenge_description: Play the hole without taking a provisional or re-tee.

name: Stress-Free Finish
challenge_description: Hole out with one putt from inside 6 feet.

name: No Big Number
challenge_description: Score double bogey or better.

name: Respectable Hole
challenge_description: Hit either the fairway or green, and make bogey or better.

name: Fair Miss
challenge_description: Miss the fairway, but stay in bounds and avoid hazards.

name: Advance and Survive
challenge_description: No full shot travels backward or sideways more than forward.

name: No Three Off the Tee
challenge_description: Do not hit out of bounds off the tee.

name: Lag Master
challenge_description: Your longest putt of the hole finishes within 4 feet.

name: Fairway or Fringe
challenge_description: Finish in either the fairway, fringe, or green with your approach sequence.

name: Trouble Avoided
challenge_description: Do not hit water, bunker, trees, or OB on the hole.

name: Tap-In Finish
challenge_description: Make your final putt from 3 feet or less.

name: Calm Hole
challenge_description: No penalty strokes and no putt longer than three attempts.

name: Tee Box Competent
challenge_description: Hit your tee shot in play and advance it at least a solid distance.

name: Fairway First
challenge_description: On a par 4 or 5, hit your tee shot in play and on the correct side of the hole.

name: Middle of the Green
challenge_description: On approach, play safely to the center of the green and hit any putting surface.

name: No Reload
challenge_description: Do not hit any shot that requires an immediate re-hit.

name: Keep the Card Clean
challenge_description: Avoid triple bogey or worse.

name: Dagger Putt
challenge_description: Make a putt of 15 feet or longer.

name: Birdie Hunt
challenge_description: Make birdie.

name: Flag Attack
challenge_description: Finish any approach inside 12 feet.

name: Long Drive King
challenge_description: Have the longest drive in the group on the hole and keep it in play.

name: Scramble God
challenge_description: Miss fairway and green, then still save bogey or better.

name: Putt for Glory
challenge_description: Make your first putt from outside 20 feet.

name: Must-Make Finish
challenge_description: Hole out from 8+ feet for par or better.

name: Perfect Par 3
challenge_description: Hit green on a par 3 and make par or better with no 3-putt.

name: Attack the Flag
challenge_description: Hit an approach inside 8 feet.

name: Snake Eyes
challenge_description: Make a putt of 20+ feet.

name: Driver Offense
challenge_description: Use driver on a risky tee shot and still hit it in play.

name: Bunker Assassin
challenge_description: Get out of a bunker and finish inside 4 feet.

name: Zero Panic
challenge_description: Recover from a terrible lie and still make bogey or better without a penalty.

name: Drain the Snake
challenge_description: Make a putt from 18 feet or longer for par or better.

name: One-Swing Turnaround
challenge_description: After a poor shot, immediately hit a great one and still make bogey or better.

name: Stick It Close
challenge_description: Finish an approach shot within 20 feet of the pin.

name: Ice Putter
challenge_description: Make a putt of 10 feet or longer.

name: Up-and-Down
challenge_description: Miss the green and still save par.

name: Fairway to Green
challenge_description: Hit fairway and green in regulation on the same hole.

name: One-Putt Hero
challenge_description: One-putt from off the green or from more than 8 feet.

name: Pin Hunter
challenge_description: On a par 3, hit the green and finish within 25 feet.

name: Long Two-Putt
challenge_description: From 30+ feet, two-putt or better.

name: Par Machine
challenge_description: Make par after missing either the fairway or green.

name: No-Waste Hole
challenge_description: Make par or better with no penalty strokes and no 3-putt.

name: Birdie Chance
challenge_description: Create a birdie putt from within 15 feet. You do not have to make it.

name: Closed Strong
challenge_description: Make par or better with a made putt from 6 feet or more.

name: Dart Board
challenge_description: Hit any approach inside 15 feet.

name: Clutch Two-Putt
challenge_description: Reach the green from 40+ feet away and still avoid a 3-putt.

name: Par 4 Precision
challenge_description: On a par 4, hit fairway and make par or better.

name: Scramble Touch
challenge_description: Miss the green, chip inside 6 feet, then make the putt.

name: Longest Drive Bonus
challenge_description: Longest drive in play gets +2.

name: Closest to Pin Bonus
challenge_description: On par 3s, closest to the pin gets +2.

name: Shared Pain
challenge_description: If any player makes double bogey or worse, every other player gets +1.

name: Sabotage Token
challenge_description: First player on the green assigns -1 to any opponent.

name: Comeback Card
challenge_description: Player currently last in game score gets +1 bonus if they complete any mission.

name: Birdie Bounty
challenge_description: Any birdie is worth +2 extra game points.

name: Bogey Tax
challenge_description: Any player making double bogey or worse gets -1 game point.

name: Long Putt Special
challenge_description: Any made putt over 10 feet is worth +1 extra.

name: Target Golf
challenge_description: Approach shots on green earn +1 extra if player also avoids a 3-putt.

name: Team Trouble
challenge_description: If one player finds water, every other player making bogey or better gets +1.

name: Group Project
challenge_description: If everyone in the group makes bogey or better, everyone gets +1.

name: Disaster Dividend
challenge_description: If any player cards triple bogey or worse, all other players get +2.

name: Clutch Multiplier
challenge_description: Any made putt over 12 feet is worth +2 instead of +1 bonus.

name: Fairway Tax
challenge_description: Any player missing the fairway on a par 4 or 5 loses 1 game point unless their mission specifically involves recovery.

name: Clean Card Bonus
challenge_description: Any player who completes the hole avoiding a penalty stroke gets +1 extra.

name: Shared Glory
challenge_description: If every player gets bogey or better, everyone gets +2.

name: Miss and Pay
challenge_description: Any player who 3-putts loses 1 game point.

name: Kingmaker
challenge_description: The player with the best real score on the hole may give +1 to any other player.

name: Somebody Birdies
challenge_description: Will anyone in the group make birdie?

name: Longest Drive Leader
challenge_description: Pick who has the longest drive in play.

name: Green Hit (Player Pick)
challenge_description: Pick any active player: will they hit the green in regulation?

name: Clutch Putt (Player Pick)
challenge_description: Pick any active player: will they make a putt over 8 feet?

name: Fairway Bet (Player Pick)
challenge_description: Pick any active player: will they hit the fairway?

name: Safe Hole
challenge_description: Will nobody in the group take a penalty stroke?

name: Trouble Hole
challenge_description: Will at least one player hit bunker or water?

name: Par 3 Dart
challenge_description: Will anyone finish inside 20 feet on the tee shot?

name: No Three-Putts
challenge_description: Will the group combine for zero 3-putts on this hole?

name: Blow-Up Alert
challenge_description: Will any player make double bogey or worse?

name: Bomb Watch
challenge_description: Will anyone drive it 260+ in play?

name: Two-Putt Field
challenge_description: Will every player who reaches the green take two putts or fewer?

name: Fairway Sweep
challenge_description: Will at least half the group hit the fairway?

name: Green Sweep
challenge_description: Will at least half the group hit the green in regulation?

name: Long Putt Drop
challenge_description: Will any player make a putt over 15 feet?

name: Clean Card
challenge_description: Will the entire group avoid penalty strokes this hole?

name: All Safe
challenge_description: Will every player keep their tee shot in play?

name: Par Train
challenge_description: Will at least two players make par or better?

name: No Warm Blanket
challenge_description: You cannot use your favorite club on the hole.

name: Pressure Tee
challenge_description: You must tee off first regardless of honors.

name: No Practice Swing
challenge_description: No practice swings on any full shot this hole.

name: Putter Nerves
challenge_description: Any putt inside 5 feet must be holed cleanly with no gimmies.

name: One-Club Down
challenge_description: You must club down by one on one full swing this hole.

name: One-Club Up
challenge_description: On one full swing this hole, you must take one extra club and choke down or swing easy.

name: Silent Swing
challenge_description: No talking through your setup, shot, or immediate result. Stay silent until the ball stops.

name: Commit or Else
challenge_description: You must choose your club within 10 seconds once it is your turn.

name: No Rangefinder
challenge_description: You may not use a rangefinder or GPS on the hole.

name: Blind Confidence
challenge_description: You must pick your club before hearing anyone else's yardage or advice.

name: Texas Hold'em
challenge_description: If your ball is on the fringe, you must putt it rather than chip it.

name: Fairway Wood Jail
challenge_description: On one non-tee full swing, you must use a fairway wood or hybrid.

name: No Hero Clause
challenge_description: If you get into trouble, you must take the safe punch-out instead of a miracle shot.

name: Bare Minimum
challenge_description: You must make bogey or better or lose 1 game point. If you do, gain the listed reward.

name: Clean Finish
challenge_description: Once you reach the green, you may not leave any putt short of the hole.

name: No Driver Day
challenge_description: You may not use driver on this hole.

name: No Free Drops
challenge_description: You may not take optional free relief on this hole (mandatory relief still applies).

name: One Ball Only
challenge_description: You may not hit a provisional or second ball on this hole.

name: Called Shot
challenge_description: Before one shot, call your intended shape or landing zone. Pull it off to score.

name: Deadpan
challenge_description: No celebration allowed if you complete your mission. Break character and lose the bonus.

name: Finger Guns
challenge_description: After a made putt, celebrate like a complete dork.

name: Commentary Mode
challenge_description: Another player narrates your next shot. If you succeed, both earn +1.

name: Walk-Off Energy
challenge_description: After your final putt, do not watch it. Start walking immediately. It still has to drop.

name: Respect the Line
challenge_description: Before a putt, dramatically squat and read it like it contains the secrets of the universe. Then make it.

name: Broadcaster Voice
challenge_description: Call your own shot in a golf-commentator voice before hitting it. If successful, score it.

name: Stone Face Par
challenge_description: Make par or better and react like it meant absolutely nothing.

name: One-Hand Wonder
challenge_description: Hit one shot one-handed during this hole, then finish double bogey or better.

name: Opposite-Hand Escape
challenge_description: On one short shot or putt, use your opposite-handed stance and still finish double bogey or better.

name: Putter Off the Fringe
challenge_description: From off the green, use putter at least once and still make bogey or better.

name: Feet Together
challenge_description: Hit one full or partial shot with your feet together, then finish double bogey or better.

name: Caddie's Choice
challenge_description: Let another player choose your club for one shot, then finish double bogey or better.

name: No Glove, No Problem
challenge_description: Play the entire hole without a glove and finish bogey or better.

name: Three-Quarter Specialist
challenge_description: On one full swing, intentionally hit a three-quarter shot and keep it in play. Finish double bogey or better.

name: Texas Wedge Life
challenge_description: Use putter from off the green at least once and finish bogey or better.

name: Eyes on the Prize
challenge_description: On one short putt inside 4 feet, hold your finish dramatically until the ball drops. Still make bogey or better.

name: The Bump-and-Run
challenge_description: Play one intentional bump-and-run chip and get it onto the green or fringe. Finish bogey or better.

name: Half-Swing Hustle
challenge_description: Take one intentional half-swing on a recovery or wedge shot and still make bogey or better.

name: No Tee, Brave Soul
challenge_description: On one tee shot, hit without using a tee when legal to do so, and keep it in play. Finish double bogey or better.

name: Back-Foot Punch
challenge_description: Hit one shot intentionally off the back foot and keep it in play. Finish double bogey or better.

name: One-Club Wizard
challenge_description: Use the same club for two consecutive non-putt shots and still make bogey or better.

name: No Stepping Off
challenge_description: On one full shot, once you address the ball, you may not step off. Hit it and keep it in play. Finish double bogey or better.

name: Match the Leader
challenge_description: Finish the hole with the same or better real score than the current leader.

name: Spoiler Alert
challenge_description: Beat at least one player who is ahead of you in game points on this hole's real score.

name: Chase Mode
challenge_description: If the player before you completes their mission, complete yours too.

name: Best in the Group
challenge_description: Record the best real score on the hole outright.

name: Survivor
challenge_description: If at least one player makes double bogey or worse, make bogey or better.

name: Pressure Pairing
challenge_description: Finish no more than one stroke worse than the best score in the group.

name: Closer's Bonus
challenge_description: If you are the last to hole out, still make bogey or better.

name: Pinball Wizard
challenge_description: Tap a moving putt one additional time to redirect it. If it drops, sequence still counts as one stroke.

name: Backboard
challenge_description: Playing partners create a human backboard (shoes) behind the hole. Your putt may bounce off it.

name: Gimme Magnet – Short
challenge_description: Any putt inside 6 feet automatically counts as holed.

name: One-Putt Wonder
challenge_description: Once your ball reaches the green, the hole can never require more than one putt.

name: Putt Preview
challenge_description: Roll one practice putt that does not count, then take your real putt.

name: Roll Back
challenge_description: If a putt or chip rolls more than 10 feet past, move the ball halfway back.

name: Foot Wedge – Small
challenge_description: Move your ball 1 club length to improve the lie.

name: Foot Wedge – Medium
challenge_description: Move your ball 2 club lengths to improve the lie.

name: Kick Save
challenge_description: If your ball finishes behind a tree, move it 1 club length sideways.

name: Fringe Fix
challenge_description: If your ball stops just off the green, place it onto the fringe.

name: Fairway Finder
challenge_description: If your drive lands in rough but in play, move it to nearest fairway edge.

name: Sand Skip
challenge_description: If your ball lands in a bunker, drop it just outside the bunker.

name: Safety Net
challenge_description: If your shot goes out of bounds, drop in bounds with no penalty stroke.

name: Power Drive
challenge_description: After your drive, move the ball 1 club length forward.

name: Power Drive – Turbo
challenge_description: After your drive, move the ball 2 club lengths forward.

name: The Booster
challenge_description: After a drive, move your ball 15 yards closer to the hole.

name: Lucky Kick
challenge_description: After a drive, move your ball one club length toward the green.

name: Equalizer
challenge_description: If another player outdrives you by 30+ yards, move your ball 10 yards forward.

name: Cart Golf
challenge_description: If someone outdrives you on the hole, place your ball at their drive location.

name: Frozone
challenge_description: If you hit water, drop on the far side with no penalty (water treated as frozen).

name: Ricochet
challenge_description: If your ball kicks OB from a tree/path, drop where it crossed with no stroke penalty.

name: Sand Savior
challenge_description: Your first bunker shot does not count if you escape the bunker.

name: Sticky Stuff
challenge_description: If approach hits green then rolls off, place it back where you believe it hit the green first.

name: Green Light
challenge_description: If approach rolls off green, place it back on edge of putting surface.

name: Mulligan Lite
challenge_description: Replay one shot on the hole, but you must use the second result.

name: Hand Wedge
challenge_description: Once this hole, toss the ball with your hand instead of hitting with a club.

name: The Hammer
challenge_description: If you hit the longest drive on the hole, subtract one stroke from your score.

name: High Roller
challenge_description: Before a shot, flip/roll a tee. If it points forward, advance ball 10 yards after shot.

name: Long Putt Insurance
challenge_description: If you three-putt, remove one putt from the score.

name: Chip Cushion
challenge_description: If chip rolls 15 feet past, move it halfway back toward the hole.

name: Green Bump
challenge_description: Once your chip lands on the green, move it one club length closer to the hole.

name: The Wormhole
challenge_description: Place your ball anywhere on the green once this hole.

name: The Teleporter
challenge_description: Replace any one shot with a drop 50 yards closer to the hole.

name: The Portal
challenge_description: If ball lands within 20 feet of green, place it on the green.

name: Ball Magnet
challenge_description: If your putt passes within 6 inches of hole on your first putt, it counts as holed.

name: The Miracle
challenge_description: Once this hole, erase one stroke from your score.
